multifactorial_stress_index.note: PC1 of deseasonalised T/S/CO2/O2/pH anomalies; one coordinated climate-change axis. Correlation with EC50 is co-trended, not causal.

verdict: Regime shift in EC50 confirmed ~2016 (Pettitt p=2.2e-22). MHW exposure shifts ~2013, ~3 yr BEFORE the biological collapse — consistent with multi-year population-scale accumulation, not an acute lag. Environmental stress is multifactorial (PC1 = 71% of T/S/CO2/O2/pH variance). Canonical critical-slowing-down early-warning signals are NOT present (absolute variance falls, AR(1) not rising) — this is a documented regime shift, not a demonstrated dynamical tipping point.
